hook: Financial stress can age you at a cellular level.

script.hook: Did you know that financial stress can actually affect your health?
beats: Chronic financial worry raises cortisol levels, which can damage your body over time.
Research shows that financial instability is linked to a higher risk of mental health issues and even cardiovascular problems.
Having an emergency fund can significantly reduce the physiological stress response.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of stressed individuals looking at bills.
Graph showing cortisol levels in relation to financial stress.
Clip of someone smiling while checking their emergency fund.
Text overlay with key statistics about health impacts of financial stress.
